body.raw:
{
    "title": "Recover Taumoeba from Adrian Atmosphere",
    "description": "Taumoeba lives in the upper atmosphere of Adrian, where it preys on Astrophage at an altitude of approximately 91.2 km.  Rocky uses his ship, the Blip-A, to dive into the atmosphere to harvest the organism while staying in his specialized xenonite-shielded, ammonia-environment ship. Taumoeba can live in temperatures ranging from -180°C to 107°C but dies when exposed to nitrogen.",
    "priority": "high",
    "assigneeId": "ef0a4221-abbc-41d9-aa13-0710ecf0a97d",
    "dueDate": "2026-04-10"
}
